description: Manages property tax assessment, collection, and delinquency tracking for all real properties within the city.
Processes business permit applications, renewals, and compliance records including taxpayer identification.
Birth, death, and marriage records of all registered civil events within the city jurisdiction.
Employee records including 201 files, payroll data, leave management, and performance evaluations.
Procurement documents including bid evaluation reports, abstracts, purchase orders, and contract records under RA 9184.
Tracks active litigation, legal opinions, ordinance drafts, and attorney-client privileged communications.
Public-facing website with transparency seal, bid notices, and service delivery information.
On-premise email server handling all internal and external communications for city employees.
Local and wide-area network connecting City Hall, annexes, and satellite offices.
IP-based CCTV cameras across city hall premises with 30-day local storage.
Records of indigent beneficiaries, PWD registrants, solo parents, and senior citizens receiving city assistance.
Patient records from city health centers, immunization logs, TB-DOTS tracking, and maternal care data.
COA-prescribed accounting system for obligation tracking, journal entries, and financial reporting.
Network-attached storage containing nightly backups of critical databases and file shares.
Windows-based workstations used by city employees, many running legacy OS versions.
